articles.title: First combined COVID-19 and influenza vaccine for people 50 years and older - European Medicines Agency
articles.description: mCombriax helps to protect against both COVID-19 caused by SARS-CoV-2 and seasonal influenza
articles.content: EMA has recommended granting a marketing authorisation in the European Union (EU) for mCombriax, a messenger RNA vaccine for protecting people aged 50 years and older against COVID-19 and seasonal in… [+3983 chars]
